title: 3 Stage Kitchen Knife Sharpener - Chefs Handheld Knife Sharpening Tool Gadget Helps Repair, Restore and Polish Blades. Diamond, Tungsten & Ceramic Sharpening Blades Non Slip Base Taylor’s Eye Witness.
features: ✅ KEEP YOUR KNIVES SHARP AND SAVE MONEY: Repair your knives rather than spending a small fortune replacing them with a new set. You can sharpen all your dull knives and bring them back to their best. ✅ WHAT IT DOES: This is a great tool to re-align the blades edge, so it feels as sharp as the day you bought it. It can be used in home or commercial kitchens. Right or left handed.

✅ 3 STAGE SHARPENING SYSTEM: 3 Slot 1 repairs and straightens damaged blades. The 2nd sharpens to restore its V-shape. Finally, the 3rd slot fine tunes for a clean polish. 1) Push the knife forward to hone the blade, re-aligning the edge to give a sharp feel and making it like new again. 2) Pull the knife for sharpening the blade. This is for the time when honing isn’t good enough anymore. The sharpening system takes away fragments of the blade to create a new sharp edge.

✅ EFFECTIVE, SAFE & EASY-TO-USE: Simply put the dull blade into the slot and pull to get a razor-sharp blade in seconds. You can sharpen stainless steel, ceramic, hard steel, large, small, pocket, boning, chef and paring knives.

✅ BASE: Our non-slip grip bottom keeps the sharpener steady and easy to hold.. With the ergonomic style it is great for your wrist and sharpening is effortless. It stores easily either in the drawer or on your kitchen top.

✅ EASY TO CLEAN: Detachable Sharpener Head - You can take the sharpener head out by pressing and pulling the small groove. Wipe clean with a soft cloth and warm soapy water. The sharpener is not dishwasher safe. ✅ GUARANTEE: Taylor’s Eye Witness are so confident in the quality of this product that we offer a 10 YEAR "NO QUIBBLE" GUARANTEE.
description: 3 Stage Kitchen Knife Sharpener - Chefs Handheld Knife Sharpening Tool Gadget Helps Repair, Restore and Polish Blades. Diamond, Tungsten & Ceramic Sharpening Blades Non Slip Base Taylor’s Eye Witness.
